Bash(rm -rf build && mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. 2>&1)

Bash(echo "=== SOURCE FILES BY DIRECTORY ===" && \\
for dir in codec packet method session transport discovery table security eval debug ssc/opal ssc/enterprise ssc/pyrite; do
  echo "src/$dir:"; find /mnt/d/wsl/workspace/tcg/cats/src/$dir -type f \\\( -name "*.cpp" \\\) 2>/dev/null | wc -l; 
done && \\
echo && echo "=== HEADER FILES BY DIRECTORY ===" && \\
for dir in codec packet method session transport discovery table security eval debug core ssc/opal ssc/enterprise ssc/pyrite; do
  echo "include/libsed/$dir:"; find /mnt/d/wsl/workspace/tcg/cats/include/libsed/$dir -type f \\\( -name "*.h" -o -name "*.hpp" \\\) 2>/dev/null | wc -l; 
done)
Bash(git add src/discovery/discovery.cpp src/method/method_call.cpp src/session/session.cpp src/ssc/opal/opal_data_store.cpp src/ssc/opal/opal_mbr.cpp src/table/table_ops.cpp)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix all build errors and warnings

Resolve narrowing conversion errors from uint64_t to uint8_t in Uid
brace-initialization by using parenthesized constructor calls instead.
Suppress unused variable/parameter warnings across session, discovery,
opal_mbr, and opal_data_store modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Add Korean Doxygen comments, example scenario annotations, and reset scenarios

- Add Korean Doxygen comments to 13 public API headers \(types.h, error.h,
  uid.h, i_transport.h, i_nvme_device.h, session.h, eval_api.h,
  sed_context.h, feature_descriptor.h, discovery.h, test_context.h,
  fault_builder.h, test_session.h\)
- Add Korean @scenario/@precondition/@steps/@expected comments to all 10
  example files
- Create examples/eval_reset_scenarios.cpp with 12 NVMe+TCG reset/exception
  scenarios \(power cycle, NSSR, controller reset, LockOnReset, SP_BUSY
  recovery, RevertTPer, PSID revert, concurrent reset, timeout, sanitize,
  partial failure, MBR reset\)
- Create tc_todo.md documenting 12 missing APIs and improvement areas

EOF
\)")
